items.value: Those are the first words I ever said.
DON'T RUN! There's a hyper-focused reader, sensible to running steps, reading its favorite book. Don't disturb its reading & thinking section; otherwise, Principal might get involved!
If you wish to see the vases, see them at a minimum distance of 1 meter! They are so precious that one touch might get them destroyed, and Principal won't like this at all!
